calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-02-2004 Off Calendar

Default Prove Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Feb-17-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Diana Padilla.
Gen Fujioka, Esq. for Plaintiff Kevin Ngai, also present, was sworn & examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, plaintiff's declaration, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff and against the defendant Siu Wah Mok.
Damages of $10,300.00
Attorney's fees of $1,375.00
Costs of $224.50
For the total of $11,899.50
Small Claims #800220, dismissed with prejudice.
Counsel to prepare Judgment.
